item.title: F-004b: Auto-Format Tables
item.intent: Tables should format themselves — columns align as you type, Tab moves between cells, new rows appear automatically
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-039 (Text Engine), FEAT-047 (Table Rendering). Auto-align table columns with space padding as user types. Tab key moves to next cell (or creates new column). Enter in last cell of last row adds a new row. Auto-add missing header separator row when user types a second row. Each operation is discrete undo step. Does NOT fire inside code blocks.
acceptanceCriteria: Table columns auto-align with space padding as user types in any cell
Tab moves cursor to next cell, Shift-Tab to previous cell
Enter in last cell of last row creates a new row with correct column count
Missing header separator row is auto-inserted when second row is typed
Table with 20 columns auto-aligns without perceptible lag
